violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Clean inside of dishwasher fill/drain area.--Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -Drain line for ice machine needs shortened so it is above the plane of the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors under dishwasher area and ice machine need cleaned including floor drain.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
